tasks.subject: Task 1: _verdict_from_graph pure helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure function returning the review verdict for a spec by counting its open Critical findings (parent_id == spec_id). No claude; fast-unit-testable.

**Files:** Modify mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py (after _real_review); Test mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** open Critical parent_id==spec_id -> NEEDS_FIXING; none -> CLEAN; reviewer=code-reviewer/hit=True/calibrate=False; resolved Critical ignored; other-spec Critical ignored.

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_orchestrate.py -k verdict_from_graph -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_orchestrate.py -k verdict_from_graph -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["open Critical parent_id==spec_id -> NEEDS_FIXING", "none -> CLEAN", "calibrate=False", "resolved Critical ignored", "other-spec Critical ignored"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: _build_builder_prompt pure helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure function reading Task body + parent Spec criteria from the graph, returning a self-contained builder-role prompt. No claude; fast-unit-testable.

**Files:** Modify mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py (after _verdict_from_graph); Test mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** prompt contains task body, every criterion text, task id, spec id; missing spec -> no raise, spec id "(none)".

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_orchestrate.py -k build_builder_prompt -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_orchestrate.py -k build_builder_prompt -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["contains task body", "contains each criterion text", "names task id and spec id", "missing spec -> no raise, (none)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Rewrite _real_launch to run the assembled prompt
tasks.description:
**Goal:** _real_launch runs job["prompt"] with mcp_config and returns the worktree path. Verified fast by monkeypatching claude + git.

**Files:** Modify mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py (rewrite _real_launch; remove dead _BUILDER_PROMPT); Test mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** calls run_claude_headless(job["prompt"], cwd=job["worktree"], mcp_config=job.get("mcp_config")); success -> {task_id, ok:True, sha, worktree}; exception -> {task_id, ok:False, error}; _BUILDER_PROMPT removed.

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_orchestrate.py -k real_launch -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_orchestrate.py -k real_launch -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["uses job prompt + mcp_config + cwd", "success returns worktree", "exception folded to ok:False", "_BUILDER_PROMPT removed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Rewrite _real_review (review-pr headless + verdict from graph)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** _real_review resolves the spec, runs /agentic:review-pr <spec_id> headless in the worktree, derives verdict via _verdict_from_graph. ANY failure -> NEEDS_FIXING. Never merges unreviewed code, never raises.

**Files:** Modify mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py (rewrite _real_review); Test mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** no open Critical -> CLEAN; open Critical -> NEEDS_FIXING; run_claude_headless exception -> NEEDS_FIXING; invoked with cwd=job_result["worktree"], mcp_config=job_result.get("mcp_config"), prompt "/agentic:review-pr <spec_id>"; no parent spec -> NEEDS_FIXING (no raise).

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_orchestrate.py -k real_review -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_orchestrate.py -k real_review -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no Critical -> CLEAN", "Critical -> NEEDS_FIXING", "claude exception -> NEEDS_FIXING", "correct cwd/mcp/prompt", "no spec -> NEEDS_FIXING no raise"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire tick() - db_path, MCP staging, prompt assembly, review enrichment
tasks.description:
**Goal:** tick() stages a resolved .mcp.json once per tick (live path only: gated on db_path AND jobs), assembles each task's builder prompt into the job dict, enriches each launch result with worktree + mcp_config before review. Fast suite (no db_path) unaffected. main() passes resolved db_path.

**Files:** Modify mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py (tick signature + body; main()); Test mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py (update fake_launch_ok to carry worktree).

**Acceptance Criteria:** new kw param db_path=None; None -> no staging + suite green; set+>=1 job -> stage_mcp_config once + jobs carry mcp_config; jobs carry prompt; set+no jobs -> no .mcp.json; review input enriched with worktree+mcp_config; main passes db_path; full fast suite green.

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -m "not llm" -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/src/agentic_mcp/orchestrate.py", "mcp-server/tests/test_orchestrate.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest -m \"not llm\" -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["db_path param", "None -> no staging, suite green", "set+jobs -> stage once, jobs carry mcp_config", "jobs carry prompt", "set+no jobs -> no file", "review input enriched", "main passes db_path"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Live llm-marked e2e (real build -> review-pr -> merge)
tasks.note: Live-validated 2026-05-24: 1 passed in 173.96s. Build via stdin; staged-agents review (Task B) ran; criterion marked satisfied; merged.
tasks.description:
**Goal:** On-demand llm-marked e2e proving the closed loop: dispatched Spec + Task, REAL _real_launch builds from the graph-assembled prompt, REAL _real_review runs /agentic:review-pr gating CLEAN, tick() merges, criterion marked satisfied.

**Files:** Create mcp-server/tests/test_headless_loop_e2e.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** marked pytest.mark.llm + skipif(not headless.claude_on_path()); uses REAL seams (only tick(..., db_path=...) supplied); after tick task in merged + node status merged + claim released + built file exists; criterion marked satisfied; structured assertions only (no prose).

**Verify:** ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_headless_loop_e2e.py -m llm -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mcp-server/tests/test_headless_loop_e2e.py"], "verifyCommand": "./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_headless_loop_e2e.py -m llm -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["llm-marked + skipif no claude", "real seams only db_path injected", "merged + status merged + claim released + file exists", "criterion satisfied", "structured assertions only"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task A: headless prompt via stdin (live-discovered fix)
tasks.note: headless.run_claude_headless feeds the prompt via stdin, not a -p argv (Windows claude.CMD truncates multi-line argv at the first newline). Unit-tested + live-validated.

tasks.subject: Task B: _real_review stages agents + inlines review-pr body (headless has no slash commands)
tasks.note: Replaces the infeasible 'claude -p /agentic:review-pr' design. Stages agents/*.md into <worktree>/.claude/agents/ and runs the inlined review-pr body. Fast-tested + live-validated (the staged spec-checker ran; criterion satisfied).
